creator: hardy.schumacher@amd.com
text:
Gnome-Commander2 does not work on FreeBSD 7.0-BETA4 AMD64.
After starting nothing happens.
Also when starting it from a console, it takes some time to do something, and then it returns to prompt without any message.
An error log or core file is not written.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: Install it and try to start Gnome-Commander2.
